---
title: Matrix
description: The set of m×n real matrices, with component-wise addition and scalar
  multiplication, as a vector space.
categories:
- Linear Algebra
---

A **matrix** is a rectangular array of numbers. The set of $m \times n$ real matrices, equipped with component-wise addition and component-wise scalar multiplication, is a vector space:

$$
M_{m \times n} = \left\{ \begin{pmatrix} a_{11} & \cdots & a_{1n} \\ \vdots & \ddots & \vdots \\ a_{m1} & \cdots & a_{mn} \end{pmatrix} \,\middle|\, a_{ij} \in \mathbb{R} \right\}
$$
